description_long: This is a medium-sized, four-drawer filing cabinet with a woodgrain finish and modern, rectangular metal handles on each drawer. The cabinet stands on four black caster wheels, making it easy to move across flat surfaces. The front features a small key lock at the top left, providing security for the contents of the drawers. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the same woodgrain texture without any additional features or openings. The handles are wide and slightly protrude, allowing for a comfortable grip when opening the drawers. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for organizing documents or office supplies in a professional or home environment.
description: A woodgrain four-drawer filing cabinet with metal handles, caster wheels, and a key lock for security. Its modern design is both functional and mobile.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with metal handles and a key lock at the top left.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain woodgrain panel and two visible caster wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view with a continuous woodgrain surface and no visible features except the wheels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the woodgrain panel and the side profiles of the handles.
